_comment: Cube with v_6 moved off the corner to (0.369, 0.179, 0.324) — non-perpendicular faces around v_6. Bevel all 3 edges incident to v_6 (selCount=3 valence=3 with skewed face normals). All 20 verts exact-match Blender via the Blender-style affine map (make_unit_cube_map sending the canonical unit-cube cap (1,0,0)/(0,1,0)/(0,0,1) to BV_0/BV_1/BV_2 and (1,1,1) to origPos), then unit-superellipsoid snap.
